title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 1.
content:
There was an Old Man with a beard,
    Who said, "It is just as I feared! -
    Two Owls and a Hen,
    Four Larks and a Wren,
    Have all built their nests in my beard!"
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 1.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
